who: HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR teams in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, unusual employee hours cause payroll errors. We provide a payroll exception reporter instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Unusual employee hours or compensation leading to payroll errors
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR teams seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM 20-50 HR teams with demo video links
Share insights in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users flag unusual hours and report discrepancies on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing payroll data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
